about.title: MagTexco: The Future of Textile Tunisia
about.image_alt: Advanced textile manufacturing at our state-of-the-art garment factory in Tunisia
about.paragraph1: With over three decades of industrial heritage, MagTexco has evolved into a cornerstone of the textile Tunisie sector. Originally established with deep roots in global manufacturing, our Sahline facility now serves as a high-tech hub for premium international fashion brands.
about.paragraph2: As a socially responsible clothing manufacturer in Tunisia, we prioritize ethical labor practices and sustainable sourcing. Our state-of-the-art garment factory in Tunisia is designed to handle complex designs—from luxury silk scarves to technical outerwear—while maintaining the highest European quality standards.
about.paragraph3: We don't just manufacture; we co-create. Our team of experts works closely with your designers to streamline the transition from sketch to shelf, ensuring your collections are delivered with precision, agility, and speed.

about_factory.title: 🏭 About Our Factory
about_factory.intro: Our production process is divided into two main stages: the Collection Phase and the Production Phase, each carefully managed to ensure quality and precision.
about_factory.certifications: Our factory is proud to be ISO 9001, ISO 14001, GOTS, and GRS certified, reflecting our commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and sustainable production.

collection_phase.phase1: PHASE 1 — Reception of the technical file and pattern creation.
collection_phase.phase2: PHASE 2 — Sourcing of fabrics and accessories, prototype manufacturing.
collection_phase.phase3: PHASE 3 — Technical adjustments and repetitions (SMS) before production.

production_phase.phase1: PHASE 1 — Technical preparation and seeded players (TDS).
production_phase.phase2: PHASE 2 — Cutting, sewing, washing and finishing.
production_phase.phase3: PHASE 3 — Export and delivery of finished products.

detailed_expertise.title: Industrial Excellence & Mediterranean Nearshoring
detailed_expertise.p1: MagTexco stands at the forefront of the 'Textile Tunisie' revolution, offering a strategic alternative to far-east manufacturing. Our facility in Sahline is not merely a production site; it is a center of technical innovation where traditional craftsmanship meets Industry 4.0. We specialize in high-complexity garment construction, managing everything from delicate silk blouses to multi-layered technical outerwear with clinical precision.
detailed_expertise.p2: By choosing a clothing manufacturer in Tunisia, global brands benefit from an unparalleled 'Time-to-Market' advantage. Our geographical proximity to Europe allows for door-to-door delivery in under 72 hours, significantly reducing inventory risks and carbon footprints. Our supply chain is built on transparency, utilizing advanced ERP systems to track every stitch from raw material reception to final export.
detailed_expertise.p3: Quality is our core mandate. Every production line is overseen by a dedicated Quality Assurance team that performs inline inspections and final AQL 2.5 audits. Our commitment to sustainability is reflected in our ISO 14001 and GOTS certifications, ensuring that your collections are not only beautiful but also ethically produced and environmentally conscious.
